name: io.github.Jay-3103/typst-resume-mcp
description: MCP server that compiles Typst resumes from YAML content into PDF files.

environmentVariables.name: TYPST_OUTPUT_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to the directory where compiled PDFs are written.

environmentVariables.name: TYPST_TEMPLATE_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to the directory containing template.typ, cv.typ, utils.typ. Defaults to the bundled typt_template/.
